title: Stop Lightning Destruction of Item
description: hehe i stop lightning from griefing your items :D
body: # Stop Lightning Destruction of Item [Fabric/Neoforge] **....is a Minecraft mod that works exactly as said in the title. Stop your items from being smited by the hands of god!** **This mod may be used in any modpack.** **This mod ONLY needs to be installed on the SERVER.** ## ❓ FAQ - Will items not be destroyed by fire anymore? - This does not prevent items from being destroyed by fire AT all. If the lightning bolt happens to spawn fire where that item is, that item is doomed. The only thing this mod does is prevent the lightning bolt from destroying the item itself. ## 👏 Credits - Thanks to Jeryn99 for code.
